zh.lifeSummary: 當Thurston de Holland II於1359年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯特維其時，他的父親Richard de Holland I34歲，母親Ameria de Kenyon22歲。他和Agnes Eleanor Harbottle至少有5個兒子。他去世於1423年在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾普雷斯特維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thurston de Holland II于1359年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯特維其时，他的父亲Richard de Holland I34岁，母亲Ameria de Kenyon22岁。他和Agnes Eleanor Harbottle至少有5个儿子。他去世于1423年在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾普雷斯特維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Dutch: genitivized form of   Holland  .

variants.name: Howland
meanings: English: variant of   Holland  .
Americanized form of Norwegian   Hovland  .

History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollon
meanings: English: altered form of   Holland  .

nameMeanings.name: Thurston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly East Anglia):
from the Anglo-Norman, Anglo-Scandinavian, and Middle English personal name Thurstan, Thorsten (Old Norse Thórsteinn, Thorsten, Anglicized as Old English Thurstān; see Thorstensen ).
habitational name from Thurston in Suffolk, so called from the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Thóri (see Thor ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Tustin
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of the Latin name Augustinus ( see Augustine ). Both forms were used selectively in various regions of England as late as the 17th century and they are found occasionally much later, but the present-day use of this form as a given name is normally a reintroduction from its survival as a surname. It is particularly popular in the United States.

variants.name: Thruston
meanings: English: metathesized form of   Thurston   1.

variants.name: Thorstensen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Thorsten, a variant of Thorstein, Old Norse Thórsteinn, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + steinn ‘stone, rock’, hence meaning ‘altar of Thor’ or perhaps ‘hammer of Thor’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thurston de Holland II was born in 1359, in Prestwich, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Holland I, was 34 and his mother, Ameria de Kenyon, was 22. He had at least 5 sons with Agnes Eleanor Harbottle. He died in 1423, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Prestwich, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thurston de Holland II est né en 1359, à Prestwich, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Holland I, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Ameria de Kenyon, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Agnes Eleanor Harbottle. Il est décédé en 1423, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Prestwich, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thurston de Holland II 1359 in Prestwich, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Holland I 34 und seine Mutter Ameria de Kenyon 22. Er hatte mit Agnes Eleanor Harbottle mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1423 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Prestwich, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thurston de Holland II è nato il nel 1359 nel Prestwich, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard de Holland I, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Ameria de Kenyon, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Agnes Eleanor Harbottle. Morì nel 1423, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Prestwich, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thurston de Holland IIが1359年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストウィチで生まれた時，父Richard de Holland Iは34歳，母Ameria de Kenyonは22歳であった。彼はAgnes Eleanor Harbottleとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1423年に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアプレストウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thurston de Holland II(이)가 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Holland I(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Ameria de Kenyon(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Agnes Eleanor Harbottle(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1423년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 프레스트위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thurston de Holland II nasceu em 1359, em Prestwich, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Holland I, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Ameria de Kenyon, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Agnes Eleanor Harbottle. Ele faleceu em 1423, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Prestwich, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thurston de Holland II родился в 1359 г. в местности прествич, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Holland I было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Ameria de Kenyon, 22. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Agnes Eleanor Harbottle. Он умер в 1423 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности прествич, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thurston de Holland II nació en 1359, en Prestwich, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Holland I, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Ameria de Kenyon, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Agnes Eleanor Harbottle. Murió en 1423, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Prestwich, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
